CONTENT.Club career: Born in Zaporizhzhia, Sarapiy began his youth career at the local Metalurh Zaporizhzhia academy. In 2010, he moved to the Dynamo Kyiv academy.In 2017 he returned to Metalurh Zaporizhzhia in the Ukrainian Second League.In 2021 he transferred to Metalist Kharkiv in the Ukrainian First League.The following year he went on loan to Dnipro-1 in the Ukrainian Premier League. He made his debut for Dnipro on 28 August 2022, scoring a goal in a 3–0 victory over Dynamo Kyiv.
CONTENT.External links: Profile on Metalist Kharkiv official websiteEduard Sarapiy at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)
CONTENT.International career: Sarapiy made two appearances for the Ukraine national under-17 football team team in 2016. In September 2022, he was called up for the first time to the Ukraine national football team ahead of UEFA Nations League matches against Armenia and Scotland, but he did not appear in either match.

SUMMARY: Eduard Yevhenovych Sarapiy (Ukrainian: Едуард Євгенович Сарапій; born 12 May 1999) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Polissya Zhytomyr   .
